questions.context_sentence: Some of them don't even stop at zebra crossings!
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 有的甚至在斑马线处都不停车！

questions.context_sentence: A youth club would be great.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 一个青年俱乐部会很棒。

questions.context_sentence: Let's get more speed cameras to catch these fast drivers.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Let's get more ____ cameras to catch these fast drivers.
questions.cn: 让我们安装更多测速摄像头来捕捉这些超速驾驶者。

questions.context_sentence: I think we should create graffiti walls where these artists can show off their art.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我认为我们应该创建涂鸦墙，让这些艺术家可以展示他们的艺术。

questions.context_sentence: I ride my bike everywhere and I just don't feel very safe, even when I'm in a cycle lane.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我到处骑自行车，但即使在自行车道上，我也感觉不太安全。

questions.context_sentence: We need more litter bins and billboards saying 'Don't drop it. Bin it!'
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We need more litter ____ and billboards saying 'Don't drop it. Bin it!'
questions.cn: 我们需要更多的垃圾箱和广告牌，上面写着“不要乱扔垃圾”。把它扔进垃圾桶！

questions.context_sentence: I really like that billboard advertising the new Italian restaurant in town.
questions.hint: 像一张账单(bill)一样的板子(board)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我真的很喜欢镇上新意大利餐厅的广告牌。

questions.context_sentence: People like to complain about the graffiti on the shops in the high street.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 人们喜欢抱怨大街上商店的涂鸦。

questions.context_sentence: All over the world there are ghost towns, towns where people don't live any more.
questions.hint: 像幽灵(ghost)一样空无一人的城镇(town)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: All over the world there are ____ towns, towns where people don't live any more.
questions.cn: 世界各地都有鬼城，人们不再居住的城镇。

questions.context_sentence: They wanted to look for diamonds and they found a lot.
questions.hint: 呆呆(dia)的人买梦(mond)幻般的钻石。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他们想寻找钻石，结果发现了很多。

questions.context_sentence: In 2008 they demolished all the buildings.
questions.hint: 大磨(demo)历史(lish)，把老房子拆了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: In 2008 they ____ all the buildings. (提示: 拆除；摧毁)
questions.cn: 2008年，他们拆除了所有建筑物。

questions.context_sentence: The only things that visitors to Kolmanskop see are empty buildings and a lot of sand.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 来到卡曼斯科的游客唯一看到的就是空荡荡的建筑物和大量的沙子。

questions.context_sentence: In 1962, a fire started under the town at an old mine.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 1962 年，镇下一个旧矿井发生火灾。

questions.context_sentence: The drivers don't care about the pedestrians.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 司机们根本不关心行人。

questions.context_sentence: Our town looks a mess and that's not good for tourism.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Our town looks a mess and that's not good for ____.
questions.cn: 我们的小镇看起来很乱，这不利于旅游业。

questions.cn: 有的甚至在斑马线处都不停车！
